gold.title: Testimonials with Marquee
gold.reason: Full marquee section with infinite scroll animation, gradient fade edges, hover-pause effect, repeating card sets, and CSS keyframe animation — 9197 downloads and 77 likes. The definitive marquee testimonials block.

gold.title: Testimonials with Marquee (serafim)
gold.reason: Same high-quality infinite marquee implementation as the serafimcloud variant with CSS keyframe scroll, fade masks, and hover-pause. Equally production-ready drop-in section.

gold.title: Premium Testimonials
gold.reason: Full-section glassmorphism testimonials with 3D rotateY slide transitions, animated gradient mesh background, floating particles, animated light orbs, auto-rotate with 6s interval, star ratings, client stats section, and dot navigation. Visually standout premium block.

gold.title: Testimonials Columns
gold.reason: Multi-column infinite vertical marquee scroll using framer-motion translateY loop — staggered durations create organic motion, with avatars, names, and roles on each card. Visually striking layout.

gold.title: Testimonial V2
gold.reason: Three-column infinite scroll testimonials with spring hover lift effects, masked gradient fade top/bottom, heading/subtitle, badge, dark mode toggle, semantic blockquote/cite markup, and 9 rotating entries across columns.

gold.title: Stagger Testimonials
gold.reason: Unique staggered card layout using angled clip-path polygon shapes, 3D rotation on inactive cards, centered active card elevated with shadow, click-to-advance with 20 testimonials — highly distinctive pattern.

gold.title: Circular Testimonials
gold.reason: 3D perspective image carousel with rotateY transforms on flanking images, word-by-word blur-in animated quote text via framer-motion, responsive two-column grid, autoplay, and keyboard navigation.

gold.title: Testimonials Section
gold.reason: 12-testimonial animated 3-column masonry grid with staggered blur/translateY entrance animations per card, decorative radial gradient background, GridPattern overlay, and section heading — production-quality full section.

gold.title: Testimonial (uilayout)
gold.reason: Bento-style 3-column testimonial grid with timeline-based scroll-reveal animations, alternating colored cards (dark, blue, neutral), avatar images in rounded squares, and decorative grid overlay — visually premium full section.

gold.title: 3D Book Testimonial
gold.reason: Interactive 3D page-flip book using react-pageflip — testimonials displayed as physical book pages with cover, index page with navigation, and per-person pages with avatar, star ratings, and quote. Unique spectacle.

gold.title: Glass Testimonial Swiper
gold.reason: 3D stacked glassmorphism card carousel with drag-to-swipe interaction, depth via scale/opacity/zIndex layers, tags, stats icons, gradient avatar initials, and dot pagination. Highly polished interactive block.

gold.title: Animated Cards Stack
gold.reason: Scroll-driven 3D card stack with translateZ depth, rotateY perspective transitions, scroll-position-linked animations, custom CSS variable theme, and fractional star ratings — cinematic scroll-reveal layout.

gold.title: Testimonial Slider 1
gold.reason: Three-column editorial slider with vertical image AnimatePresence transition, thumbnail row navigation, vertical 'Reviews' text label, AnimatePresence text panel, pagination counter, and arrow controls — unique magazine-style layout.

silver.title: Animated Testimonials
silver.reason: Two-column section with auto-rotating framer-motion slide-from-right cards, star ratings, avatar, company/role, dot navigation, optional logo cloud, and scroll-triggered entrance — solid complete block with 592 downloads.

silver.title: Simple Animated Testimonials
silver.reason: Animated testimonial section with framer-motion entrance, auto-rotating card stack with slide transition, prev/next arrow buttons, vertical dot navigation, star ratings, avatar, and optional trusted companies section.

silver.title: Testimonials
silver.reason: Auto-advancing Embla carousel with aspect-video cards, avatar, name, and quote text — solid standard carousel block with 861 downloads and 7 likes.

silver.title: Testimonials
silver.reason: Asymmetric bento grid (large spanning card + smaller cards) with company logos, long-form quotes, and avatars — clean and well-composed multi-testimonial section.

silver.title: Testimonals Carousel
silver.reason: Center-aligned carousel with company logos above quote, Embla scroll, name, role, avatar, and gradient fade edges. Clean centered testimonial layout.

silver.title: Testimonal Slider
silver.reason: Headlessui Transition-animated avatar spinner with rotating testimonial text, auto-rotate, fuchsia spotlight gradient, and name-pill navigation buttons — functional with visual flair.

silver.title: Testimonial
silver.reason: Draggable stacked card carousel with framer-motion spring physics, swipe-to-dismiss gesture, 3 visible cards with scale/rotation depth, dot indicators — interactive component with 475 downloads and 13 likes.

silver.title: Testimonial
silver.reason: Two-column animated testimonials pairing stacked rotated portrait photos with quote text panel, AnimatePresence transitions, arrow navigation, and animated grid background — clean and complete.

silver.title: Testimonials (image grid)
silver.reason: Image-overlay testimonial grid with full-bleed photo cards, gradient overlays for text readability, staggered entrance animations, and section heading — visually distinctive editorial layout.

silver.title: Testimonial Cards
silver.reason: Draggable glassmorphism card deck with framer-motion stacking, rotation, and x-position offsets — drag-to-shuffle interaction on dark backdrop with 789 downloads and 10 likes.

silver.title: Testimonial Slider
silver.reason: Side-by-side image + card layout with AnimatePresence slide transitions, star rating component, prev/next navigation, and dot progress indicators — solid complete slider.

silver.title: Clean Testimonial
silver.reason: Sophisticated minimal testimonial with magnetic custom cursor (mix-blend-difference), word-by-word SplitText blur entrance animation, progress bar, stacked avatar previews, and animated accent line reveal.

silver.title: Testimonial Carousel
silver.reason: Clean centered Embla carousel with company logo, large quote text, author name, role, avatar thumbnail, and dot navigation — standard well-built testimonial carousel.

silver.title: MultiMedia Testimonial
silver.reason: Feature-rich testimonial card supporting text, image, and video (dialog player with auto-play/reset), scroll area, avatar, and hover shadow — versatile multi-media single card.

silver.title: Testimonials
silver.reason: Two-column card grid with star ratings, quote, avatar thumbnail, name, role, section header with badge — clean well-structured static testimonial section.

silver.title: Typewriter Testimonial
silver.reason: Hover-triggered typewriter text animation with audio playback, animated avatar ring, framer-motion tooltip popup — distinctive interactive hover-to-reveal testimonial widget.

silver.title: Image Testimonial Grid
silver.reason: Reusable MasonryGrid component with framer-motion whileInView entrance animations — provides the Pinterest-style masonry column layout primitive for building image testimonial grids.

silver.title: Testimonials
silver.reason: Testimonials section component from ayushmxxn — classified as silver based on author's consistent quality and the standard testimonials block pattern.

bronze.title: Shiny Button
bronze.reason: Misclassified — this is a circular icon button component with gradient hover shimmer effects, not a testimonial. Incorrectly placed in the testimonials category.

bronze.title: Avatar
bronze.reason: Misclassified — this is a raw shadcn/ui Avatar primitive component (Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback), not a testimonial section.

bronze.title: Kinetic ShatterBox Section
bronze.reason: Misclassified — this is a physics-based draggable breakable card with crack animations, debris particles, and respawn timer. Not a testimonial component.

bronze.title: Testimonial Slider
bronze.reason: Empty implementation — the component file contains only '// Happy Coding' with no actual code. Non-functional stub.

bronze.title: Testimonial Card
bronze.reason: Single reusable testimonial card primitive — no section wrapper, no multi-card layout. Displays one testimonial with star rating, quote, avatar, name, and role. A building block, not a marketing section.

bronze.title: Testimonial
bronze.reason: Single static testimonial block for one quote — optional company logo, author name, position, and avatar with no carousel or grid. Too minimal for a full marketing section.

bronze.title: Minimal Testimonial
bronze.reason: Simple 3-testimonial selector widget with stacked avatar bubbles, divider, and fade-transition quote text — minimal widget with no section structure or marketing framing.

bronze.title: Unique Testimonial
bronze.reason: Minimal 3-testimonial selector with centered quote, blur/fade animation, and expandable avatar pill buttons — compact widget without section layout or marketing context.
